name: Mixed Vegetable Slaw
recipeIngredient: 1 Red or Yellow Bell Pepper (seeded and julienned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed and julienne the red or yellow bell pepper.
2. Mix yogurt, Miracle Whip, onion, mustard, basil, salt, lemon peel, and Tabasco sauce in a large bowl.
3. Add cabbage, carrots, bell peppers, and radishes; toss to coat.
4. Refrigerate covered for at least 1 hour to allow flavors to blend.
